title: When 75 days remain
body:
To Hazel,

Every time I felt like talking to you I wrote it down on my notepad, so this isn't a letter written in one go. It's written on multiple days so you may find it all over the place.

9 June 2026

I watched Obsession. Dude wtf was that movie! I watched it in the theatre. Posts related to that movie were just popping up on my feed, so I just booked the tickets spontaneously at 12 PM and went to INOX in R City for the 3:15 show by taking a half day from the office, alone. Since it was in the afternoon on a weekday, the theatre wasn't that crowded. The seats in front of me were pretty much empty and in my row there was only one guy, so it just felt like I'm alone in the theatre and the sound in theatres was just so immersive ki evdhi fatli na 😭 during jump scares. Like we watched supernatural movies, Weapons, Longlegs recently but this movie was just beyond weird.

11 June 2026

Tu Euphoria cha finale baghitla? They end it all 😭 I thought a new season came after years so maybe they were coming up with a new storyline for the characters for further seasons but they aren't. Like how can they do that 😭 I won't go into the specifics as I don't know ki tu baghitla ahes ka nahi tyamule uggach spoilers nako.

12 June 2026

You know what I just got to know? That Chail-Chabili is also a doctor 🤯 She is a Physiotherapist. Now whether to call BPT graduates doctors or not is a different topic of discussion but I was just surprised to know her professional side that I didn't know for so long. I guess nobody knows.

13 June 2026

You know, there's not a day that passes by without me checking Platypus Files daily, I do it every day in the hope that you will write to me someday 😭 and today when I saw it, I was literally over the moon. That Froakie delivering a letter background is so good. This is gonna be the first weekend in a long time without talking to you and it's so hard to go through 😭. Also thank you for the Spotify follow back, all the people you follow are artists and now you have one more artist in your following list 🤪. Also there's not a day that passes by without me listening to your playlists and our blend. Thanks for those new playlists that you added on your profile, or maybe they were private previously and you made them public now, but thanks for that. Thank you for taking out your time and writing that letter on Platypus Files. You don't know how long I've been waiting for it, like the whole week. I'm feeling the urge to write back to you immediately but I'll wait two more days and include my reply in the 75 days wala letter.

Good to know that you are doing great! I'm good as well. And yeah this is how the conversation will go, asynchronously, like we are in the 19th century. I was just thinking about how people used to do it back then but then I realised the beauty of it. This is not just some message where you picked up your phone and texted. You took your time to add that page on Platypus Files. You created that background image of Froakie delivering the letter. I genuinely can't thank you enough, it means so much to me. I waited for this every day of this week. It is more than just words to me. The time, the patience, the anticipation of waiting for it and finally when you see it there, suddenly it's such a beautiful feeling that I can't put into words 🥹. If or whenever you add the next letter please don't delete this first one. I still read your PDF and now I have something else to read that is written by you.

14 June 2026

After this there's the 45 days wala letter, meaning a 30 day gap, and I don't think I can wait that long 😭 maybe I'll send you a few letters in between. And I remember that thing about not keeping that exam day letter on the site so I'll remove it. Also in our last conversation on, I was sad. Later I was recalling your messages in my head and remembered that I didn't acknowledge some of your messages, the one picture you sent me about the Malvani restaurant you went to. And yes, I'll be waiting to see you with your Delphox 🔥. And I am happy that you are using it, as I said my only motive is, even if it's helping you 0.1% to feel good about yourself then it's worth the efforts 🥹. 

15 June 2026 

It's officially "Middle of the Juuuunee" 

And I am listening to Heat Waves by Glass Animals the whole day 

 I thought I'd have not so good weekend but I ended up doing jam with you so all good I guess. Also thanks for playing Down Bad by Taylor Swift, I am listening to that song ever since especially sped up version.

I’ve added a new AI feature to Hazel’s Corner! Your planner now has AI integration.
Every Sunday, AI analyzes your weekly tasks and gives you a detailed weekly study report, including your weekly performance summary, strong areas, areas that need more attention, subject analysis, study patterns, improvement suggestions, and recommendations for the next week.
For more details, I’ve shared a PDF on Discord. Just log in, download the PDF, and log out. 😭 Sorry for making you log in, but you need to know how to use it, so please download and read the PDF, its very useful feature.

As someone who works in the data field, I know how much analyzing performance data helps us understand patterns, find areas to improve, and make better decisions. I hope this little feature helps you understand your study journey better and improve week by week. 🙂 

 Best wishes for this week and more!

title: When 45 days remain
body: You are closer than your fear says. Do not negotiate with the loudest thought. Look at the next page. Let that be enough for now.

title: When 15 days remain
body: The finish line can make everything feel sharper. Let your revision become simple and kind. You do not need to become someone else to deserve a good day.

title: Exam day letter
body: Go in with your whole heart. Not a perfect heart. A real one. You prepared through fear, boredom, loneliness, and days nobody saw. That matters. Breathe, read carefully, and come back to yourself between every question.
